description: Composition Grey T-shirt for men made of 84% polyester and 16% spandex, has long sleeves, stitch detailing on the shoulders with nike swoosh on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron; do not iron on decorations This T-shirt from nike is designed for all your sporting needs - it's sure to become your favourite tee! Pair it with shorts and sports shoes.
